summary: v0.10.0 scope: LEO→MOM rebrand, dead code cleanup, bootstrap fixes, Homebrew, docs overhaul. Deferred: mom-protocol extraction, mom-web (independent), outreach wave (decoupled).

content.decision: v0.10 is the rebrand release. All subsequent feature work ships under MOM identity.

rebrand: CLI rename leo → mom with leo alias + deprecation warning
KB → Memory terminology (~130 occurrences, package rename kb/ → memory/)
dead_code_cleanup: Remove leo update command (sync eliminated by MCP)
Remove DefaultTierMapping + HookDef from adapter interface
Remove legacySpecialists, unused MemoryConfig fields, discoverUninitializedChildRepos, Health(), GenerateAll(), vacuous tests
Fix constraint texts (specialist, profile, pipeline tiers)
Remove SessionEvent.Tier, languageLabel dead branches, uninstall text
improvements: CLAUDE.md boot rework: index lookup by tag, logs fallback, version check
CLI version check on boot (cache-based, zero latency)
documentation: Usage guides: getting-started, best-practices, mcp-setup, migration, scope-hierarchy

deferred: mom-protocol extraction — defer post v0.11 when protocol stabilizes
mom-web repo — independent of release cadence
Outreach wave — decoupled from releases, execute when ready
kept_for_future: ReadAllScopes / InheritedDoc in multiscope.go — needed for MCP multi-scope recall in v0.11
content.rationale: Do rebrand first so all subsequent feature work ships under MOM identity. Clean dead code before renaming to avoid renaming code that will be deleted.
